title: Task outcome: Change the GitHub visibility of the DinoBrain repository from private to public after verifying
summary: Changed GitHub repository visibility for clockmansy/dinobrain from private to public after verifying the target repository, admin permissions, and a minimal tracked-file secret scan. GitHub connector now reports visibility=public and git ls-remote confirms origin/main remains accessible at 8c8d194ba8c1b79a967d3f690dd20e315793c3d6. The data repository was not changed.
claim: Task outcome for dinobrain: Changed GitHub repository visibility for clockmansy/dinobrain from private to public after verifying the target repository, admin permissions, and a minimal tracked-file secret scan. GitHub connector now reports visibility=public and git ls-remote confirms origin/main remains accessible at 8c8d194ba8c1b79a967d3f690dd20e315793c3d6. The data repository was not changed.
request: Change the GitHub visibility of the DinoBrain repository from private to public after verifying the target repo and doing a minimal tracked-file secret/sensitive scan.
decisions: Only changed the app repository clockmansy/dinobrain; left dinobrain-data untouched because it contains operational memory/data and prior policy separates app release from data sync.
Used git credential-manager token in-process because gh CLI is not installed and the GitHub connector does not expose repository visibility update.
next_steps: If the data repository should also become public, run a separate explicit review because it may contain user/session memory.

evidence.snippet: Changed GitHub repository visibility for clockmansy/dinobrain from private to public after verifying the target repository, admin permissions, and a minimal tracked-file secret scan. GitHub connector now reports visibility=public and git ls-remote confirms origin/main remains accessible at 8c8d194ba8c1b79a967d3f690dd20e315793c3d6. The data repository was not changed.
